text: I wake up at 6:30 AM on weekdays and 8:00 AM on weekends. I set two alarms 5 minutes apart.
My morning routine: wake up, drink a glass of warm lemon water, 20 minutes of yoga, then shower. Takes about 45 minutes total.
I do intermittent fasting 16:8. My eating window is 12 PM to 8 PM. I skip breakfast and have black coffee instead.
I go to the gym Monday, Wednesday, and Friday. Upper body on Monday, legs on Wednesday, full body on Friday. Each session is 45-60 minutes.
I run 5K every Tuesday and Thursday morning at 7 AM in the park near my house. My current best time is 24 minutes.
I read for 30 minutes before bed every night. Currently reading non-fiction books about psychology and habits.
I meditate for 10 minutes every morning using the Headspace app. I prefer guided meditation focused on focus and clarity.
I meal prep every Sunday for the week. Usually cook chicken, rice, and roasted vegetables. Takes about 2 hours.
I drink at least 3 liters of water daily. I use a marked water bottle to track intake throughout the day.
My sleep schedule is 10:30 PM to 6:30 AM. I use night mode on all devices after 9 PM and avoid screens 30 minutes before bed.
I take a 15-minute walk after lunch every day. It helps with digestion and gives me a mental break from work.
I do a weekly review every Sunday evening. I plan the upcoming week, review goals, and journal about what went well and what to improve.
I limit coffee to 2 cups per day, both before noon. I switched from regular milk to oat milk six months ago.
I practice cold showers every morning for the last 3 months. Started with 30 seconds, now up to 2 minutes. Great for alertness.
I use the Pomodoro technique for work: 25 minutes focused work, 5 minute break. I do 8 pomodoros on a productive day.
